QF.id: VI Public Offering and Corporate Actions_4

question.text: In the case of book closure, when does the depository generate the holding report (list of BOs)?

answer.text: As of end of the day of one day prior to book closure start date
As of the book closure start date
As of the book closure end date
As of two days prior to book closure start date

explanation.text: **The Logic:** In cases where the issuer sets up a corporate action specifying book closure dates, the depository generates the holding report as of end of the day of one day prior to book closure start date. **The Trap:** The book closure start date itself seems logical, but the report is generated one day prior. **Cross-Exam Context:** Book closure timing is important for settlement and corporate action processing. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Ensure all pending transfers are completed before the day prior to book closure to be included in the beneficiary list.
